intro: First Aid + Baby Care Centers sit next to each other in every park. Restrooms are frequent throughout — nearest one is always on the My Disney Experience map (restroom icon).
note: Baby Care Centers: free rest/nursing/changing space, sell diapers/formula/OTC meds. First Aid: free bandages/OTC meds, can store refrigerated medication, arranges Centra Care urgent care transport if needed. Emergency: call 911 or any Cast Member.

items.name: 🏰 Magic Kingdom
items.desc: Between Casey's Corner & Crystal Palace, just off Main Street (castle end, turn left).

items.name: 🌐 EPCOT
items.desc: Odyssey Building, between Test Track and the Mexico Pavilion.

items.name: 🎬 Hollywood Studios
items.desc: Just inside main entrance, at/past Guest Relations (unstaffed baby care — ask Guest Relations for access).

items.name: 🌴 Animal Kingdom
items.desc: Discovery Island, next to Creature Comforts (Starbucks).

items.name: 🌊 Water Parks
items.desc: First Aid only (no Baby Care): Typhoon Lagoon near Leaning Palms; Blizzard Beach near Lottawatta Lodge.
